column7: Promotes uniform tillering and high plant stand; apply at transplanting and 21 DAT for best response.
Provides complete basal nutrition; phosphorus promotes tillering and root proliferation.
Effective in slightly alkaline lowland soils; S component improves sulfur-deficient paddy fields.
Reduces lodging in high-yield conditions; improves milling quality through better grain development.
Promotes uniform crop stand through improved root activity; iron supports chlorophyll and reduces mid-season yellowing.
Nano-NPK supports sustained release to match crop demand; sea kelp and humic acid improve soil biology.
Boosts beneficial rhizobacteria population; improves nutrient cycling and reduces dependence on synthetic inputs.
Reduces N fertilizer cost for widely planted inbred; Azolla organic N supports yield without excess mineral N input.
Foliar NPK corrects mid-season deficiency without flooding disruption; improves yield consistency in widely planted variety.
